channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][PV][STAFF][续作][公开] Anime News Network Sasaki Peeps 2nd 季度 动画 公开 October Debut, More Returning 制作阵容 新作 宣传视频 Video
item.description: 1st season's episode, assistant director Yūshi Ibe now helms new season at SILVER LINK. ― Kadokawa revealed on Monday a new promotional video, new visual, additional returning staff members, and the... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Sasaki and Peeps 2nd Season Anime Reveals October Debut, More Returning Staff in New Promo Video

item.title: [动画][续作][公开] Anime News Network Black Clover 动画 季度 2 公开 Director, October TV Debut
item.description: Ayataka Tanemura returns as director from last 1st season episodes, Sword of the Wizard King film ― TV Tokyo announced on Monday that the second anime season based on Yūki Tabata's Black Clover manga... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Black Clover Anime Season 2 Unveils Director, October TV Debut

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Within Villainess 动画 Casts Ayane Sakura as Star Maiden
item.description: Sakura plays in-story otome game's heroine, who also has reincarnated soul within her ― Kadokawa presented a new "heroine" promotional video and another teaser visual for the television anime of... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Within the Villainess Anime Casts Ayane Sakura as Star Maiden

item.title: Anime News Network Japanese Animation TV Ranking, June 1-7
item.description: Ascendance of a Bookworm Part 3 earns 3.2%, Demon Slayer rebroadcast earns 2.3% ― The 2022 live-action film based on the Mr. Osomatsu (Osomatsu-san) anime aired on TV Tokyo on Saturday, June 6 at... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Japanese Animation TV Ranking, June 1-7
